headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Public Service Enterprise, Raises Price Target to $90
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains Public Service Enterprise (NYSE:PEG) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $85 to $90.

headline: Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) Upgraded to ‘Outperform’
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) is included among the 11 Best Utility Stocks to Buy for Dividends in 2026.
